name: tera-shift
short_effect: When Terapagos enters the battle, it turns into its Terastal Form until the end of the battle.
effect_text: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it absorbs the energy around itself and transforms into its Terastal Form.
flavor_text: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it absorbs the energy around itself and transforms into its Terastal Form.
